structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Alarm - Commanded Off, Status On
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status. Commanded off, status on: Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Fan commanded OFF but status ON for 15 seconds after change
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 5.7.6.3. Fan alarm is indicated by the status input being different from the output command after a period of 15 seconds after a change in output status. b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4
